raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Describing a deliberate spiritual practice of seeking alignment with a higher power through prayer and meditation",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "A God/higher power exists and can be contacted consciously",
    "Prayer and meditation are effective means to improve such contact",
    "This higher power has a specific will for individuals that can be known",
    "Divine power is required to enact that will",
    "Prayers should be limited exclusively to these purposes"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent within a theistic framework that assumes a knowable divine will and efficacy of prayer/meditation; logically consistent in restricting prayer's scope",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The recipient holds compatible theistic or spiritual beliefs, finds the practice psychologically beneficial for discipline or recovery, and experiences it as non-coercive",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "Presented as empirically validated or universally required rather than faith-based, or used to discourage personal agency in favor of passive reliance on divine intervention"
}

parsed_json.communicative_function: Describing a deliberate spiritual practice of seeking alignment with a higher power through prayer and meditation
implicit_claims: A God/higher power exists and can be contacted consciously
Prayer and meditation are effective means to improve such contact
This higher power has a specific will for individuals that can be known
